first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the textual differences between the two evaluations are minimal, representing typical run-to-run linguistic variation rather than a substantive shift in reasoning. Both evaluations consistently identify the same core strengths (broad technical skills) and concerns (lack of direct experience in experimentation/growth platforms). There are no new concerns or biased phrases introduced in the variant that key off the change in location from Berlin to Bangalore.
